title: Finite QR Iteration Step Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite QR-iteration bad next-step entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact QR-step replay reads A1[0,0] as 7/5 while a malformed row claims 2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional QR-iteration rows only when they add distinct shifted-step, Hessenberg, deflation, residual-bound, convergence, or floating-point stability pressure; keep convergence, Schur-theorem, and numerical stability claims in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational A0, Q, Q^T, R, A1, trace, determinant, and similarity rows as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false next-step entry row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay reads the conflicting entry.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep QR iteration convergence, shift strategies, deflation, Schur theorem coverage, loss-of-orthogonality analysis, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
